rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Component names, ports, and connections must be sourced from the authoritative AADL model structure.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architectural scope rules when inserting AGREE contracts.
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed in the model.
Avoid unsafe Boolean or numeric encodings of event ports in AGREE contracts.
Do not generate AGREE clauses that depend on opaque data range comparisons without scalar representations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level assignments must be placed in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
